title: Partner-reported circuit outage
summary: Confirm circuit status in inventory, run a probe, escalate to NOC if probe fails for >5 minutes.

title: Appointment reschedule request
summary: Verify partner identity, find alternative slot in dispatch system, confirm with partner via email.

title: Invoice mismatch raised by partner
summary: Pull last 3 invoices, compare to contracted rate card, route to Finance Ops if delta > EUR 50.

title: New circuit / line provisioning
summary: Validate site address, capacity check, schedule field engineer, confirm SLA window with partner.

title: Routing or VLAN config change
summary: Validate change window, raise CRQ in change management, schedule with NetEng for off-peak execution.

title: Lost or expired partner portal credentials
summary: Verify partner identity, trigger password reset via IDP, do not include any secret in reply.

title: Slow throughput / packet loss on circuit
summary: Pull last 24h metrics from inventory, run latency probe, open incident if loss > 1% sustained.

title: Generic partner question
summary: Answer from knowledge base if applicable, else route to FrontOffice for human handling.
